content: Remote OK VFX Artist AI Training Vancouver Canada Prolific Academic Ltd <div><h2 style="text-align: center;"><strong><em>VFX Artist - AI Training</em></strong></h2><p>&nbsp;</p><div style="text-align: center;"><strong><em>About Prolific</em></strong></div><p>Prolific is not just another player in the AI space â we are building the biggest pool of quality human data in the world.</p><p>Over 35,000 AI developers, researchers, and organizations use Prolific to gather data from paid study participants with a wide variety of experiences, knowledge, and skills.</p><p>&nbsp;</p><h4 style="text-align: center;"><strong><em>The Opportunity</em></strong></h4><p>We are inviting 3D Artists and VFX experts with experience creating computer generated scenes and assets to join our global network for a high level gaming project.&nbsp;</p><p>&nbsp;</p><p>Rather than traditional VFX work, we are offering an opportunity to licence existing 'on-the-shelf' works from your archives, plus hourly compensation for technical processing.&nbsp;</p><p>&nbsp;</p><h4 style="text-align: center;"><em><strong>What You Will Be Doing:</strong></em></h4><ul><li>Asset licencing: Licence existing works from your personal/ studio archives for a flat fee</li><li>Technical processing including rendering, layering, and preparing these files to our data specifications&nbsp;</li><li>In some cases, making variations to scenes and re-rendering</li></ul><p>&nbsp;</p><p><strong>Please note:</strong> This is a "bench" model. By verifying your credentials, you gain eligibility for high-level research tasks as they become available. Access is based on project demand and professional profile matching</p><p>&nbsp;</p><div style="text-align: center;"><strong><em>What Youâll Bring</em></strong></div><ul><li>Experience as a 3D, Technical or VFX Artist or Compositor in games, film or digital production</li><li>Experience with Unreal Engine, Unity &amp; Houdini, Maya / Blender / Cinema4D and similar</li><li>Expertise in rendering, lighting and texturing</li><li>Comfortable using technical workflows and tools</li><li>Existing assets for licensing, with scenes separated into coherent, compositable layers&nbsp;</li></ul><p>&nbsp;</p><p>Nice To Have</p><ul><li>Experience in the Gaming industry</li><li>Elements including depth, albedo, shading, gloss, cryptomat</li><li>Complex occlusions, atmospherics and crowd dynamics</li></ul><p>&nbsp;</p><p><strong>Please n vfx, training, 3d Vancouver 2026-05-04T06:00:09+00:00 1131439 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-vfx-artist-ai-training-vancouver-canada-prolific-academic-ltd-1131439 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Junior Mid Full Stack Software Engineer Black Canyon Consulting OverviewBlack Canyon Consulting (BCC) is working with our partner Knowledge3 (knowledge3.ai) to search for a Junior/Mid Full Stack Software Engineer with DevOps exposure supporting delivery of knowledge-first systems. You will build systems that turn fragmented scientific and enterprise data into structured, reusable knowledge assets that support explainable reasoning, governed analytics, and trustworthy AI. This is a hands-on engineering role focused on building and operating production-ready applications across frontend, backend, and deployment environments. You will support systems built around a question-driven approach, where APIs, data pipelines, and interfaces align to clearly defined query patterns and system behavior.This is a remote-first role with a preference for U.S.-based candidates working East Coast hours.
